name: Coherent Neural Qubit Array
blurb: Quantum processors directly interface with self-assembled neural substrates to process information biologically.

name: Graphene-Threaded Cortical Mesh
blurb: Graphene filaments conduct signals across self-assembled neural architectures with near-zero resistive loss.

name: Distal Neural Reconstruction Array
blurb: Teleportation transmits neural substrate blueprints that self-reassemble functional brain circuits at a remote site.

name: Living Graphene Scaffold Graft
blurb: Biological cells colonize nanobot-built graphene lattices to form load-bearing yet living structural tissue.

name: Self-Assembling Robotic Exoskeleton
blurb: Robots direct graphene nanobot scaffolds to construct and repair their own structural frames in the field.

name: Teleported Lattice Bootstrapper

name: Dermally Encoded Bioresponse Layer
blurb: Nanofilm reads biological skin signals and translates them into physiologically accurate VR feedback loops.

name: Robot-Relayed Tactile Presence Skin

name: Teleported Sensation Replay Mesh
blurb: Tactile states are captured, teleported, and re-rendered on a remote user's nanofilm in real time.

name: Living Tissue Nanoswarm Constructor
blurb: Biotech-programmed nanobot swarms fabricate vascularized organ tissue layer-by-layer inside a living host.

name: Graphene-Guided Swarm Depot

name: Flash-Deployed Nanobot Swarm Gate

name: Quantum Molecular Pathway Decoder

name: Graphene Qubit Plane Processor

name: Entangled Lattice Remote Instantiation
blurb: Quantum nanocompute lattices are teleported into place and resume coherent computation at the destination.

name: Living Cell Quantum Courier

name: Quantum-Relay Robotic Dispatch Network

name: Quantum-Linked Presence Portal

name: Quantum-Scheduled Nanoforge Controller

name: Graphene-Tracked Cellular Delivery Rail

name: Neuromorphic Gene Circuit Compiler

name: Quantum-Screened Therapeutic Candidate Engine

name: Remote Touch Transposition Layer

blurb: Nanofabricated graphene wires extend qubit interconnect buses down to individual-molecule-sized processor nodes.
